title: Category card teaser is an unlabeled random resource blurb
fix: home category cards now label the teaser as what it is: 'Featured: <resource title> —' prefix (font-medium) before the blurb, so resource copy can no longer read as category copy

samples: Featured: 2025 NAB Show: CineCentral — The 2025 NAB Show's CineCentral focuses on...
Featured: AMD Advanced Media Acceleration (AMA) SDK — A comprehensive SDK from AMD...
